ownership: builder owns src/ edits; orchestrator owns .claude/ + validation; parallel work only on distinct files
current_status: ALL 15 LAYERS COMPLETE + green. 9 rewrite (foundations->wire-finalize) + 6 polish (metadata cascade, god-file splits, OpenAICompatible splits, typealias->ModelId, ToolLoopAgent decomposition). Branch refactor/ts-residue-cleanup, full gate (compileKotlinJvm+jvmTest+checkKotlinAbi) green at HEAD.
hard_rules: no camelCase top-level fns (only PascalCase factories); logic on types/in units; Flow over suspend; sealed CLASS not interface; no public/top-level/companion mutable var; no secondary ctor/lateinit/!!; sealed errors; typed over Map<String,JsonElement>/Any?

layers.name: foundations
layers.what: sealed AiSdkException hierarchy; @JvmInline value classes for ids (ModelId/ProviderId/ToolCallId/ToolName/ApprovalId); GenerationInput sealed class + toMessages(system); CallConfig type (replaces flattened param lists); content/message sealed cleanup

layers.name: util-dissolve
layers.what: Util.kt grab-bag -> cohesive units: Headers value type + members; ApiKeySource/SettingsResolver; JsonOps; kill all loose util fns

layers.name: provider-core
layers.what: LanguageModel/Provider abstractions; ProviderOptions sealed hierarchy + Raw; factory+class pattern on ONE reference provider (OpenAI): fun OpenAI(client,settings):Provider + class OpenAIProvider; drop throwing singletons

layers.name: generation
layers.what: TextGenerator class (Flow-first): fun TextGenerator(model,config):TextGenerator; fun generate(input):Flow<GenerateResult>; fun stream(input):Flow<StreamEvent>; behavior on GenerationInput; kill generateText/generateTextImpl/streamTextCallParams loose fns

layers.name: tools
layers.what: sealed Tool<I,O> use-cases (schema + execute travel together, concept #741); kill loose tool fns

layers.name: agent
layers.what: ToolLoopAgent -> Flow-first + new sealed Tool model; keep the good channel-parallel exec + sealed Outcome

layers.name: ui-chat
layers.what: Chat/Completion/StructuredObject -> StateFlow over sealed phase; align shared-state-kernel (#748)

layers.name: providers-fanout
layers.what: remaining 34 providers -> factory+class + typed options (PARALLEL workflow, distinct files)

layers.name: wire-finalize
layers.what: typed sealed protocol states across providers; delete react/rsc/svelte/vue/angular/codemod/langchain/llamaindex residue; regenerate ABI dumps once; full jvmTest green

layer15_status: IN PROGRESS: 3 collaborators created (AgentTelemetryDispatcher/ToolApprovalCoordinator/ToolCallRepairer) but ToolLoopAgent call sites not rewired -> 81 unresolved-ref errors (runHook/fireTelemetry/emitError) + cascade suspension errors. Re-engaged: construct+hold collaborators, delegate every moved call to the instance. Awaiting green + commit.
layer14_done: VALIDATED (6227a39): all 85 String typealiases eliminated -> generic ModelId value class; ModelId<->String boundary unwrapped at wire; 65 files, ABI regenerated, full gate green.
layer11_done: VALIDATED (god-file splits, parallel workflow): Google 2027->162, Bedrock 1544->402, MCP 2221->1491, ToolLoopAgent 1879->1806 (abstract-class floor), 16 new same-package files, ABI-neutral, combined gate green. ToolLoopAgent deeper decomposition (Approval/Repair/Telemetry collaborators) is an optional further follow-up.
